description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a two-tone finish, featuring a matte black lower frame and a tan or light beige slide. The slide has angular serrations at the rear for improved grip during operation, and the frame includes a prominent trigger guard and a textured grip for secure handling. The barrel is short and compact, with a visible muzzle and a squared-off front end. The handgun has a rail segment under the barrel for mounting accessories such as lights or lasers. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, and the overall design is streamlined with minimal external markings. The trigger, slide release, and other controls are subtly integrated into the frame, contributing to a clean and functional appearance.
description: A compact, two-tone semi-automatic handgun with a matte black frame, tan slide, textured grip, and accessory rail. The design is modern, streamlined, and functional with minimal external markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan slide with rear serrations, black textured grip, trigger guard, and accessory rail under the barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle opening, squared-off slide, and the accessory rail beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ejection port, slide serrations, and the flush magazine base integrated into the grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide, rear sight, and the top of the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is angular and robust, constructed from matte black polymer with a slightly contoured shape for ergonomic handling. It features subtle texturing for improved traction, likely stippled or lightly checkered, and has a squared-off base. There are no visible finger grooves, logos, or embellishments, giving it a utilitarian and modern appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for finger placement. It is thick and robust, with a smooth finish and no visible undercuts or squared-off edges. The design is simple and functional, lacking additional texturing or integrated accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and compact, with a standard profile and a squared-off muzzle. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the exterior finish matches the tan color of the slide. The barrel appears to be unmarked and has a clean, utilitarian look.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, with only the rear serrations providing visual detail.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with a squared-off contour. It lacks any extensions, flares, finger rests, or visible logos, contributing to the handgun's streamlined and minimalist design.
